limitation: Sentiment labels are derived from ratings rather than manual annotation.
implication: Text sentiment and star rating may not always align perfectly.

limitation: Exact duplicate leakage was controlled, but near-duplicate semantic overlap may still exist.
implication: Some hidden similarity may remain even after grouped splitting.

limitation: Heuristic error taxonomy is useful but not a substitute for full manual annotation.
implication: Error categories should be interpreted as structured approximations.

limitation: Location and time fields may be incomplete or noisy depending on the original dataset.
implication: Geographic or temporal findings should be interpreted cautiously.

limitation: Transformer training quality is still constrained by dataset size and compute budget.
implication: The transformer result may not represent the absolute best possible fine-tuned model.
